heading: Continued operation of University
label: 2112a Continued operation of University
text: The University may not be closed.
notes: Prior ProvisionsProvisions similar to those in subsec. (a) of this section were contained in , , , which was set out as a note under prior to repeal by .Pub. L. 103–337, div.
